title: 😳 The death toll after the earthquake in Venezuela exceeded 900...
title_en: 😳 The death toll after the earthquake in Venezuela exceeded 900...
title_uk: 😳 Кількість жертв землетрусу у Венесуелі перевищила 900...
description: 😳 The death toll after the earthquake in Venezuela exceeded 900 people, - Reuters According to the latest data, 920 people became victims of the natural disaster, and another 3,360 were injured. 172 people remain under the rubble, and more than 50 thousand are considered missing. Reuters also reports that on Friday Venezuela was again shaken by an earthquake of magnitude 4.9, which was felt in Caracas and nearby areas....
description_en: 😳 The death toll after the earthquake in Venezuela exceeded 900 people, - Reuters According to the latest data, 920 people became victims of the natural disaster, and another 3,360 were injured. 172 people remain under the rubble, and more than 50 thousand are considered missing. Reuters also reports that on Friday Venezuela was again shaken by an earthquake of magnitude 4.9, which was felt in Caracas and nearby areas....
description_uk: 😳 Число погибших после землетрясений в Венесуэле превысило 900 человек, - Reuters По последним данным, жертвами стихии стали 920 человек, еще 3 360 получили ранения. Под завалами остаются 172 человека, а более 50 тысяч считаются пропавшими без вести. Reuters также сообщает, что в пятницу Венесуэлу вновь потрясло землетрясение магнитудой 4,9, которое ощущалось в Каракасе и близлежащих районах....

title: Crimea: Airstrike attack on residential area
title_en: Crimea: Airstrike attack on residential area
description: Ukraine says it struck Russian military supply vessels, air defense systems in occupied Crimea. The strikes, which hit Project 15310 cable-laying ships Volga and Vyatka and caused "a massive fire on board," were part of President Volodymyr Zelensky's 40-day operation to "exert pressure on Russia," according to Ukraine's Security Services.
description_en: Ukraine says it struck Russian military supply vessels, air defense systems in occupied Crimea. The strikes, which hit Project 15310 cable-laying ships Volga and Vyatka and caused "a massive fire on board," were part of President Volodymyr Zelensky's 40-day operation to "exert pressure on Russia," according to Ukraine's Security Services.
description_uk: Ukraine says it struck Russian military supply vessels, air defense systems in occupied Crimea. The strikes, which hit Project 15310 cable-laying ships Volga and Vyatka and caused "a massive fire on board," were part of President Volodymyr Zelensky's 40-day operation to "exert pressure on Russia," according to Ukraine's Security Services.

title: Kyiv: DTEK and GE Vernova plan 900-million-euro gas-fired plant to...
title_en: Kyiv: DTEK and GE Vernova plan 900-million-euro gas-fired plant to...
title_uk: Київ: ДТЕК і GE Vernova планують газовий завод вартістю 900 млн євро...
description: DTEK and GE Vernova plan 900-million-euro gas-fired plant to strengthen Ukraine’s war-hit power grid. The two companies signed a memorandum of understanding to develop the 650-megawatt combined-cycle gas turbine — enough to provide power to 500,000–1 million consumers — at DTEK’s Burshtyn thermal power plant in Ivano Frankivsk Oblast.
description_en: DTEK and GE Vernova plan 900-million-euro gas-fired plant to strengthen Ukraine’s war-hit power grid. The two companies signed a memorandum of understanding to develop the 650-megawatt combined-cycle gas turbine — enough to provide power to 500,000–1 million consumers — at DTEK’s Burshtyn thermal power plant in Ivano Frankivsk Oblast.
description_uk: DTEK and GE Vernova plan 900-million-euro gas-fired plant to strengthen Ukraine’s war-hit power grid. The two companies signed a memorandum of understanding to develop the 650-megawatt combined-cycle gas turbine — enough to provide power to 500,000–1 million consumers — at DTEK’s Burshtyn thermal power plant in Ivano Frankivsk Oblast.

title: 🙄Three more Polish politicians are returning state awards to Ukraine....
title_en: 🙄Three more Polish politicians are returning state awards to Ukraine....
title_uk: 🙄Ще троє польських політиків повертають Україні державні нагороди....
description: 🙄Three more Polish politicians are returning state awards to Ukraine. These are former Marshal of the Sejm Marek Kuchcinski, ex-Minister of Defense Mariusz Blaszczak, and former Head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Zbigniew Rau. They explained their decision as "respect for the victims of the Volyn tragedy", support for the President of Poland, Karol Nawrocki, and protest against the actions of Ukrainian political elites.
description_en: 🙄Three more Polish politicians are returning state awards to Ukraine. These are former Marshal of the Sejm Marek Kuchcinski, ex-Minister of Defense Mariusz Blaszczak, and former Head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Zbigniew Rau. They explained their decision as "respect for the victims of the Volyn tragedy", support for the President of Poland, Karol Nawrocki, and protest against the actions of Ukrainian political elites.
description_uk: 🙄Еще трое польских политиков возвращают Украине государственные награды Речь идет о бывшем маршале Сейма Мареке Кухциньском, экс-министре обороны Мариуше Блащаке и бывшем главе МИД Збигневе Рау. Свое решение они объяснили «уважением к жертвам Волынской трагедии», поддержкой президента Польши Кароля Навроцкого и протестом против действий украинских политических элит.

description_uk: Кінбурнська коса, наступ ЗСУ та відступ московитів 🌐 В мережі сьогодні йде палке обговорення подій на Кінбурнській косі, але це обговорення обросло невідповідними фактами. 🚫 На сьогоднішній день немає жодних підтверджень про активний відхід кацапів з коси. Більш того, ворог продовжує застосовувати місцевість для пусків БПЛА "Молнія" в бік Миколаєва та Херсону та має інші засоби у вигляді РЕБ та...
